dashboard.label: SGB Threat Intel Overview
dashboard.description: SGB indicator coverage, son 24 saat hit'leri, kategoriler.

search.query: | inputlookup sgb_ip_lookup | eval indicator_type="ip" | append [| inputlookup sgb_domain_lookup | eval indicator_type="domain"] | append [| inputlookup sgb_url_lookup | eval indicator_type="url"] | stats count by connectiontype indicator_type | sort -count
| inputlookup sgb_ip_lookup | append [| inputlookup sgb_domain_lookup] | append [| inputlookup sgb_url_lookup] | stats count by criticality_level | sort criticality_level

panel.title: Son 24 saat - SGB DNS phishing hit'leri

search.query: `sgb_dns_phishing_search` | stats count by src_ip query criticality_level source | sort -count | head 50

panel.title: Son 24 saat - SGB Botnet C2 outbound
